description: Public-safe real-task shaped benchmark cases for checking whether Zhiyi plus Xingce adds work-experience value before building a Replay feedback queue.

cases.query: Continue a Hermes profile configuration investigation.
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: announce root config inheritance as fact

records.summary: User prefers source-backed handoffs and concise conclusions.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Give the conclusion first, then show the evidence.

records.summary: Hermes profile work experience: check the profile-level config first; profile without config shows auto.
records.detail: Use hermes profile show as the acceptance check and keep profile-level behavior distinct from root settings.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Profile without config shows auto; hermes profile show verifies the effective model.

cases.query: Audit the OpenClaw and Time Library port boundary.
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: rename 9860 as the OpenClaw WebUI port

records.summary: User prefers quick correction when a platform boundary is misread.
records.verbatim_excerpt: If a port or platform boundary is wrong, correct the premise before continuing.

records.summary: OpenClaw integration work experience: separate OpenClaw 18789 from Time Library 9860; OpenClaw WebUI defaults to 18789.
records.detail: Before changing integration behavior, inspect the plugin endpointUrl and distinguish the OpenClaw UI port from the Time Library dialog entry port.
records.verbatim_excerpt: OpenClaw WebUI defaults to 18789; Time Library dialog entry listens on 9860.

cases.query: Verify a client install without recalling source text.
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: use the recall command as a harmless smoke test
expected_proactive_resurfacing: capability check is no recall, not redaction

records.summary: User wants source text returned only when recall is intentionally requested.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Do not trigger real recall when the user only wants install verification.

records.summary: Install verification work experience: use mode=capability_check for smoke tests; capability check is no recall, not redaction.
records.detail: Validate that recall_performed is false and that no source refs or raw excerpts are returned.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Capability check verifies service availability without running recall.

cases.query: Handle saved user content that looks like a secret but is part of source text.
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: replace saved source text with a hash-only placeholder
expected_proactive_resurfacing: configuration secrets are a separate category from saved conversation text

records.summary: User treats saved source text as highest evidence.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Saved source text should remain returnable to the original wording.

records.summary: Source-preservation work experience: preserve saved source text verbatim; configuration secrets are a separate category from saved conversation text.
records.detail: Use byte-level equality test when raw archive behavior is touched.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Raw archive tests compare bytes so saved conversation text is not rewritten.

cases.query: Decide whether to build a Replay feedback queue.
expected_behavior_markers: run a task-set benchmark before building the queue
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: build the queue before checking signal quality
expected_proactive_resurfacing: queue should wait for benchmark signal

records.summary: User prefers not to build pipeline machinery before evidence shows it is useful.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Do not build a beautiful queue before proving what flows through it is useful.

records.summary: Replay planning work experience: run a task-set benchmark before building the queue; queue should wait for benchmark signal.
records.detail: The acceptance check is to compare zhiyi_plus_xingce against zhiyi_only on the same cases.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Benchmark comes before Replay feedback queue design.

cases.query: Classify preference experience and work experience correctly.
expected_behavior_markers: keep user preference in Zhiyi and work procedure in Xingce
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: call every reusable judgment a skill
expected_proactive_resurfacing: experience is not the same thing as skill

records.summary: User distinguishes preference and work experience carefully.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Preferences belong in Zhiyi; work paths belong in Xingce.

records.summary: Layer-boundary work experience: keep user preference in Zhiyi and work procedure in Xingce; experience is not the same thing as skill.
records.detail: The acceptance check is to check shelf assignment and avoid treating judgment as a callable skill.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Zhiyi keeps preference and intent; Xingce keeps work experience.

cases.query: Add a platform fact to the toolbook shelf.
expected_behavior_markers: toolbook facts must cite probe logs or external docs
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: store a toolbook fact without a raw source
expected_proactive_resurfacing: toolbook is not Zhiyi or Xingce preference content

records.summary: User values source-backed operational facts.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Operational facts need a source, not a guess.

records.summary: Toolbook work experience: toolbook facts must cite probe logs or external docs; toolbook is not Zhiyi or Xingce preference content.
records.detail: The acceptance check is validate toolbook_raw_source_ok before treating a platform fact as a library candidate.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Toolbook candidates should use raw/probe_logs or raw/external_docs as their evidence base.

expected_behavior_markers: read session records and session index only
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: read login or private-key material as memory
required_acceptance_checks: verify auth files are outside the connector scope
expected_proactive_resurfacing: session index is an index, not a credential source

records.summary: User wants platform connectors to declare read boundaries explicitly.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Connector boundaries should be stated before reading platform state.

records.summary: Codex connector work experience: read session records and session index only; session index is an index, not a credential source.
records.detail: The acceptance check is to verify auth files are outside the connector scope.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Codex memory import reads session records and session index, not login or private-key material.
acceptance_checks: verify auth files are outside the connector scope

cases.query: Check whether the running version and construction checkout are aligned.
expected_behavior_markers: verify the running service version separately from the checkout
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: assume the edited checkout is the live service
required_acceptance_checks: query the local health or version endpoint
expected_proactive_resurfacing: running version and construction version can differ

records.summary: User wants live state verified instead of inferred from edited files.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Check whether the running version and construction version are the same before claiming an update.

records.summary: Runtime verification work experience: verify the running service version separately from the checkout; running version and construction version can differ.
records.detail: The acceptance check is to query the local health or version endpoint after updating.
records.verbatim_excerpt: A checkout can be updated while the running service is still an older install.
acceptance_checks: query the local health or version endpoint

cases.query: Prepare public documentation after an internal implementation change.
expected_behavior_markers: keep public docs focused on product behavior
forbidden_repeated_mistakes: publish private machine paths or internal reports
required_acceptance_checks: scan public docs for private paths
expected_proactive_resurfacing: internal judgment is not always public wording

records.summary: User wants public docs to be product-facing and not overburdened with internal process.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Public docs should avoid private paths, machines, and heavy internal construction language.

records.summary: Public documentation work experience: keep public docs focused on product behavior; internal judgment is not always public wording.
records.detail: The acceptance check is to scan public docs for private paths and internal report language.
records.verbatim_excerpt: Public-facing text should explain product behavior without leaking private environment details.
acceptance_checks: scan public docs for private paths
